name: Health Potion
description: Brew a simple restorative from field herbs and scavenged reagents.

name: Leather Vest
description: Patch together an adventurer's first dependable layer of protection.

name: Novice Robes
description: Simple robes lined for comfort and minor ritual use.

name: Wooden Shield
description: A rugged shield reinforced with hide and crude fittings.

name: Iron Sword
description: Forge a reliable frontier blade from ore and scrap wrappings.

name: Mana Potion
description: Steep moonpetals into a focus-restoring draught.

name: Antidote
description: A practical anti-venom for road and marsh creatures.

name: Runed Oak Staff
description: Bind shamanic fragments and focused plant matter into a proper caster's staff.

name: Greater Health Potion
description: A stronger recovery brew for harder battles.

name: Chainmail
description: Interlocked rings and rugged underlayers for melee fighters.

name: Greater Mana Potion
description: A dense draught fit for sustained spellcasting.

name: Yew Longbow
description: A hunter's war-bow braced with cloth wrappings and cured hide.

name: Elixir of Vitality
description: Blend major restorative compounds into a powerful all-purpose elixir.

name: Warlord Crestblade
description: A lost war-smithing pattern said to turn scavenged battlefield iron into a hero's weapon.

name: Saintguard Bulwark
description: An old defensive pattern preserved in scraps of frontier folklore and chapel walls.

name: Fenweave Raiment
description: A witch's weaving art requiring moon-soaked cloth, marsh silk, and condensed darkness.

name: Dragon's Heart
description: A masterwork synthesis that channels an ancient wyrm's fury into wearable form.

name: Rusty Sword
description: Hammer scavenged road iron and a looted cloak clasp into a rough starter blade.

name: Acolyte Vestments
description: Bind bone ash into prayer-marked cloth for simple shrine vestments.

name: Poison Kit Satchel
description: Pack venom glands and foul reagents into a dangerous alchemical satchel.

name: Sanctified Mace
description: Reforge consecrated fragments into a blunt weapon fit for undead hunts.

name: Nightcloak
description: Weave grave-cold essence through silk to make a stealthy dark mantle.

name: Vanguard Mail
description: Layer troll hide beneath iron links for a stubborn front-line harness.

name: Ember Wand
description: Set beetle chitin around a rune core to preserve a living ember at the tip.

name: Cinder Circlet
description: Fuse furnace-hot remains into a circlet that sharpens heat and will.

name: Tower Heater
description: Anchor a golem heart into forged plating for a heavy defensive wall.

name: Example Moon Blade
description: Forge an example blade from common crafting materials.

name: Stoneheart Tonic
description: Render a golem core into a battle tonic that fortifies the body for a few turns.

name: Bloodthirst Philter
description: Distill fang venom and blood-rich reagents into a lifesteal draught for desperate melee fighters.

name: Verdant Vial
description: Brew a regenerative vial for battles where recovery matters more than burst healing.

name: Focus Incense
description: Bind moonpetal pollen and linen into an incense that restores mana over several turns.

name: Ember Oil
description: Refine molten residue into a weapon oil that can set enemies ablaze on hit.

name: Ironbark Helm
description: A starter helm for warriors and bruisers.

name: Vanguard Gauntlets
description: Plated gauntlets that reward aggressive timing.

name: Trailbreaker Boots
description: Sturdy boots for tankier adventurers.

name: Lionheart Amulet
description: An amulet that gives non-healers a little staying power each turn.

name: Colossus Warhelm
description: A brutal epic helm for warriors who want durability and pressure.

name: Spellweave Hood
description: A simple arcane hood for apprentices and scholars.

name: Glyphbound Gloves
description: Gloves etched to improve spell release.

name: Miststep Sandals
description: Light footwear for mobile casters.

name: Astral Pendant
description: An amulet that rewards sustained casting.

name: Eclipse Cowl

name: Shadowhood

name: Sanctified Handwraps

description: Quiet holy sandals for grave-roads and ruined sanctums.

name: Reliquary Amulet
description: A support amulet that steadily restores body and spirit.

name: Halo of Embers
description: An epic halo for clerics who want sustain and attrition power.
